summary: Manual spec review approved the GH-105 minimal spec path for PR #161 content head 95de53b4241f7a68cd45eca9d7ae1840b9c314e7. The spec, plan, implementation contract, and task carrier bound the batch to #105-#109 and keep #110-#113/#95 out of scope.
reviewed_validation_summary: PR #161 validation as of 2026-07-03T06:16Z: `npm run typecheck`, `npm run smoke`, `npm audit --audit-level=high`, `git diff --check`, `loom fact-chain --target . --json`, `loom doctor --target . --json`, `loom verify --target . --json`, `loom suite validate --target . --item GH-105 --json`, `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item GH-105 --json`, and `loom pr metadata-preflight --surface merge_ready` passed. Hosted `py-compile`, `demo-bootstrap`, `repo-local-cli`, and `loom-check` passed on run `28642190625`; hosted `loom-pr-merge-gate` failed only because GH-105 review artifacts were scaffold/stale before this carrier refresh. `loom build --target . --item GH-105 --build-evidence .loom/specs/GH-105/build-evidence.json --json` and `loom review run --target . --item GH-105 --json` are blocked by suite CLI JSON consumption / repo-local `tools/loom.py` surface; global suite commands passed, and no repo-local Loom shim was added. Manual review found no blocking product findings for the GH-105 #105-#109 scope.
follow_ups: #110-#113 remain for the #95 evidence/source/session reference batch; GH-105 does not complete #95.
#94 can only close after PR #161 merges and closeout evidence is written for #105, #106, #107, #108, and #109.
Fix the Loom review-record / suite CLI JSON consumption surface outside this App PR so authored spec review records can be created by the tool again.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The GH-105 minimal suite path is explicit and bounded. `loom suite validate --target . --item GH-105 --json` and `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item GH-105 --json` passed; minimal not_applicable rationale keeps full suite artifacts out of scope for this bounded renderer fixture batch.

consumed_inputs.suite_validation: loom suite validate --target . --item GH-105 --json; loom suite carrier validate --target . --item GH-105 --json
